mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hub_job_outbox ( request_id, event_type, topic, partition_key, payload, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, next_retry_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{eventType}, #{topic}, #{partitionKey}, CAST(#{payload} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT partition_key FROM hub_job_outbox WHERE request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

WITH picked AS ( SELECT id FROM hub_job_outbox WHERE ( status = 'PENDING' AND next_retry_at <= NOW() ) OR ( status = 'PUBLISHING' AND COALESCE(locked_at, updated_at, created_at) < NOW() - (#{staleSeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second') ) ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE hub_job_outbox o SET status = 'PUBLISHING', locked_by = #{lockedBy}, locked_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() FROM picked WHERE o.id = picked.id RETURNING o.*
mapper.update: UPDATE hub_job_outbox SET status = 'SENT', published_at = NOW(), last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE hub_job_outbox SET status = 'PENDING', retry_count = retry_count + 1, last_error = #{errorMessage}, next_retry_at = NOW() + (#{delaySeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second'), locked_by = NULL, locked_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE hub_job_outbox SET status = 'FAILED', last_error = #{errorMessage}, locked_by = NULL, locked_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint AS total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PENDING')::bigint AS pending, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PUBLISHING')::bigint AS publishing, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SENT')::bigint AS sent, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED')::bigint AS failed, COUNT(*) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'PUBLISHING' AND COALESCE(locked_at, updated_at, created_at) < NOW() - (#{staleSeconds} * INTERVAL '1 second') )::bigint AS stale FROM hub_job_outbox
